category_sources: source_facts.description says log4c is a logging framework for C.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides log4c; source_facts.homepage is the official log4c site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official log4c documentation site, with installation and configuration documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; the official SourceForge project exposes the log4c source repository at /p/log4c/log4c/.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a C logging framework; official homepage describes a Log4j-modeled C library.
